title: sensitivity spec
description: Canonical schema for a two-axis sensitivity grid (e.g., WACC x Terminal Growth Rate, EV/EBITDA x Revenue Multiple). Renders a grid with row axis labels on the left, column axis labels across the top, and a highlighted base case cell. Values are typically implied share prices, equity values, or multiples, stored as pre-formatted display strings.

table_label.description: Label shown above the table (e.g., 'Implied Share Price ($)' or 'Enterprise Value ($M)'). Defaults to 'Implied Share Price ($)'.

row_axis_label.description: Label for the row axis (e.g., 'WACC →'). Rendered italic gray to the left of the table.

col_axis_label.description: Label for the column axis (e.g., 'Terminal Growth Rate →'). Rendered italic gray centered above the column headers.

row_headers.description: Labels for each row of the grid (e.g., ['8.5%', '9.0%', '9.5%', ...]).

col_headers.description: Labels for each column of the grid.

values.description: 2D array of pre-formatted display strings. Outer array has len(row_headers) entries; each inner array has len(col_headers) entries.

base_row.description: Zero-based row index of the base case cell (highlighted). Use -1 to disable.

base_col.description: Zero-based column index of the base case cell.

source_refs.description: Optional 2D parallel array of source refs, one per cell in values. Outer array has len(row_headers) entries; inner arrays have len(col_headers). Used by the audit layer to verify that the grid ties back to the workbook model.
